records.m_Talk_ENG: There is a woman named Lamia.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is a woman named Lamia.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is a woman named Lamia.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She is a famous fortune-teller in the Underground, known for altering people's fates.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She is a famous fortune-teller in the Underground, known for altering people's fates.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She is a famous fortune-teller in the Underground, known for altering people's fates.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But despite her popularity, no one knows where she lives or where to meet her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But despite her popularity, no one knows where she lives or where to meet her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But despite her popularity, no one knows where she lives or where to meet her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's a rumor that she often visits bars serving high-quality alcohol.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's a rumor that she often visits bars serving high-quality alcohol.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's a rumor that she often visits bars serving high-quality alcohol.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And that's why all the bars are doing their best to improve the quality of their drinks.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And that's why all the bars are doing their best to improve the quality of their drinks.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And that's why all the bars are doing their best to improve the quality of their drinks.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just hearing that she had appeared in some bar is enough to attract customers.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just hearing that she had appeared in some bar is enough to attract customers.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just hearing that she had appeared in some bar is enough to attract customers.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't you think we should report him to the police?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't you think we should report him to the police?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't you think we should report him to the police?

records.m_Talk_ENG: He's bleeding a lot... Do you think he's okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: He's bleeding a lot... Do you think he's okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: He's bleeding a lot... Do you think he's okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, dear. A bloodied man drinking all by himself? How romantic it is.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, dear. A bloodied man drinking all by himself? How romantic it is.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, dear. A bloodied man drinking all by himself? How romantic it is.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's none of your business, so piss off.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's none of your business, so piss off.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's none of your business, so piss off.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah, how cute. You're like a wounded wolf cub, growling at others.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah, how cute. You're like a wounded wolf cub, growling at others.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah, how cute. You're like a wounded wolf cub, growling at others.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not here to chit chat, so leave me alone when I ask nicely.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not here to chit chat, so leave me alone when I ask nicely.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not here to chit chat, so leave me alone when I ask nicely.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right. Then I'll just silently drink beside you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right. Then I'll just silently drink beside you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right. Then I'll just silently drink beside you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmp!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmp!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmp!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh...?! What the hell was that for?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh...?! What the hell was that for?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh...?! What the hell was that for?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I disinfected your wound. Because I feel like I'll get drunk off the stench of blood rather than booze at this rate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I disinfected your wound. Because I feel like I'll get drunk off the stench of blood rather than booze at this rate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I disinfected your wound. Because I feel like I'll get drunk off the stench of blood rather than booze at this rate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How is it? It's way more effective than drinking your pain away, isn't it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How is it? It's way more effective than drinking your pain away, isn't it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How is it? It's way more effective than drinking your pain away, isn't it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...A healing ability? I heard Counters with those kinds of abilities are hard to find.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...A healing ability? I heard Counters with those kinds of abilities are hard to find.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...A healing ability? I heard Counters with those kinds of abilities are hard to find.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you like it? And it's not just healing that I can do, you know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you like it? And it's not just healing that I can do, you know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you like it? And it's not just healing that I can do, you know.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aren't you nosy? Are you a volunteer for something or what?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aren't you nosy? Are you a volunteer for something or what?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aren't you nosy? Are you a volunteer for something or what?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't say it was for free.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't say it was for free.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't say it was for free.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I got no money. If you're trying to rip someone off, you chose the wrong guy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I got no money. If you're trying to rip someone off, you chose the wrong guy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I got no money. If you're trying to rip someone off, you chose the wrong guy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, really? I thought people who drink with blood on their hands are usually loaded.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, really? I thought people who drink with blood on their hands are usually loaded.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, really? I thought people who drink with blood on their hands are usually loaded.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Guess you've been watching too many movies.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Guess you've been watching too many movies.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Guess you've been watching too many movies.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right. I won't take your money then. But tell me a story instead.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right. I won't take your money then. But tell me a story instead.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right. I won't take your money then. But tell me a story instead.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How did you end up here with all those wounds?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How did you end up here with all those wounds?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How did you end up here with all those wounds?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I hurt a person. But I don't want to gossip about something like that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I hurt a person. But I don't want to gossip about something like that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I hurt a person. But I don't want to gossip about something like that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is it your first time? Hurting another person?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is it your first time? Hurting another person?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is it your first time? Hurting another person?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But it seems like you didn't really enjoy it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But it seems like you didn't really enjoy it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But it seems like you didn't really enjoy it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't be ridiculous. It's too late to turn back now... but there was nothing I could do this time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't be ridiculous. It's too late to turn back now... but there was nothing I could do this time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't be ridiculous. It's too late to turn back now... but there was nothing I could do this time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm... Nothing you could do, eh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm... Nothing you could do, eh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm... Nothing you could do, eh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's odd. Because in my eyes, it looks like you'll be drenched in a lot of blood in the future.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's odd. Because in my eyes, it looks like you'll be drenched in a lot of blood in the future.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's odd. Because in my eyes, it looks like you'll be drenched in a lot of blood in the future.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you were also a man, I would've already. If you're here to pick a fight, find someone else.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you were also a man, I would've already. If you're here to pick a fight, find someone else.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you were also a man, I would've already. If you're here to pick a fight, find someone else.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, you're a cop, aren't ya?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, you're a cop, aren't ya?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, you're a cop, aren't ya?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Did you have someone do a background check on me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Did you have someone do a background check on me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Did you have someone do a background check on me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's just a feeling I got. Once you've met a lot of people in bars, you can tell what they do based on their impressions.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's just a feeling I got. Once you've met a lot of people in bars, you can tell what they do based on their impressions.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's just a feeling I got. Once you've met a lot of people in bars, you can tell what they do based on their impressions.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Were you hurt because of criminals?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Were you hurt because of criminals?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Were you hurt because of criminals?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I accidentally slipped while I was helping out an idiot friend.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I accidentally slipped while I was helping out an idiot friend.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I accidentally slipped while I was helping out an idiot friend.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you accidentally hurt someone, you must not be a very good cop. How can an innocent citizen like me rest at ease knowing this, hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you accidentally hurt someone, you must not be a very good cop. How can an innocent citizen like me rest at ease knowing this, hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you accidentally hurt someone, you must not be a very good cop. How can an innocent citizen like me rest at ease knowing this, hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph. You don't have to worry about that. I'm gonna quit, anyway.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph. You don't have to worry about that. I'm gonna quit, anyway.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph. You don't have to worry about that. I'm gonna quit, anyway.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Willfully becoming unemployed?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Willfully becoming unemployed?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Willfully becoming unemployed?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's none of your business.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's none of your business.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's none of your business.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A-ha, so you've decided to become a criminal just because you made one lousy mistake?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A-ha, so you've decided to become a criminal just because you made one lousy mistake?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A-ha, so you've decided to become a criminal just because you made one lousy mistake?

records.m_Talk_ENG: At least I'm not shameless enough to continue as a cop after committing a crime.
records.m_Talk_DEU: At least I'm not shameless enough to continue as a cop after committing a crime.
records.m_Talk_FRA: At least I'm not shameless enough to continue as a cop after committing a crime.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My friend... He said he'd find me a spot in his mafia family. I'll have to start over there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My friend... He said he'd find me a spot in his mafia family. I'll have to start over there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My friend... He said he'd find me a spot in his mafia family. I'll have to start over there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So you committed a crime because of your friend, and now you're going to go work for him?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So you committed a crime because of your friend, and now you're going to go work for him?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So you committed a crime because of your friend, and now you're going to go work for him?

records.m_Talk_ENG: He's reckless, and stupid enough that I want to beat him up. But he's good at business.
records.m_Talk_DEU: He's reckless, and stupid enough that I want to beat him up. But he's good at business.
records.m_Talk_FRA: He's reckless, and stupid enough that I want to beat him up. But he's good at business.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Good luck. I think you'll be able to succeed in anything with your possibilities.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Good luck. I think you'll be able to succeed in anything with your possibilities.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Good luck. I think you'll be able to succeed in anything with your possibilities.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit. I don't know why I'm even telling a woman I just met in a bar all this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit. I don't know why I'm even telling a woman I just met in a bar all this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit. I don't know why I'm even telling a woman I just met in a bar all this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's all right. People want to let out their true feelings when they're drunk.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's all right. People want to let out their true feelings when they're drunk.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's all right. People want to let out their true feelings when they're drunk.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And I'm the type who can't remember a thing after waking up the next day.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And I'm the type who can't remember a thing after waking up the next day.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And I'm the type who can't remember a thing after waking up the next day.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I wish I was like that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I wish I was like that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I wish I was like that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you regret it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you regret it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you regret it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Keke, of course. I regret it so much that I consider myself pathetic for ever dreaming of becoming a police officer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Keke, of course. I regret it so much that I consider myself pathetic for ever dreaming of becoming a police officer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Keke, of course. I regret it so much that I consider myself pathetic for ever dreaming of becoming a police officer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I had known this was going to happen, I would have started working with my friend from the beginning.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I had known this was going to happen, I would have started working with my friend from the beginning.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I had known this was going to happen, I would have started working with my friend from the beginning.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This friend of yours... I think it's best you don't rely on him too much.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This friend of yours... I think it's best you don't rely on him too much.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This friend of yours... I think it's best you don't rely on him too much.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The shock of being betrayed by something or someone you trusted hits harder than you might think.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The shock of being betrayed by something or someone you trusted hits harder than you might think.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The shock of being betrayed by something or someone you trusted hits harder than you might think.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph. That's something I don't need to worry about. He's a straight-shooting loyal guy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph. That's something I don't need to worry about. He's a straight-shooting loyal guy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph. That's something I don't need to worry about. He's a straight-shooting loyal guy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're leaving already?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're leaving already?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're leaving already?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. Sorry that all I can do is pay for your drinks for treating my wounds.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. Sorry that all I can do is pay for your drinks for treating my wounds.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. Sorry that all I can do is pay for your drinks for treating my wounds.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, really? Thanks!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, really? Thanks!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, really? Thanks!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...It looks like there's an error on the bill. Are you with a group or something?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...It looks like there's an error on the bill. Are you with a group or something?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...It looks like there's an error on the bill. Are you with a group or something?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm a bit of a heavy drinker.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm a bit of a heavy drinker.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm a bit of a heavy drinker.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, why don't you just run your own bar or something?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, why don't you just run your own bar or something?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, why don't you just run your own bar or something?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm planning on it. Once my situation gets better, that is.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm planning on it. Once my situation gets better, that is.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm planning on it. Once my situation gets better, that is.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Once everything works out well, I'll come visit your bar some time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Once everything works out well, I'll come visit your bar some time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Once everything works out well, I'll come visit your bar some time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Bye-bye.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Bye-bye.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Bye-bye.

records.m_Talk_ENG: An ambitious, but warm-hearted man... Those types usually get a knife to their backs.
records.m_Talk_DEU: An ambitious, but warm-hearted man... Those types usually get a knife to their backs.
records.m_Talk_FRA: An ambitious, but warm-hearted man... Those types usually get a knife to their backs.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe I should've given him my business card?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe I should've given him my business card?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe I should've given him my business card?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lamia is a kind woman who doesn't know how to lie.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lamia is a kind woman who doesn't know how to lie.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lamia is a kind woman who doesn't know how to lie.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even without her lying, humans' inertia of desire attracts people to come to her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even without her lying, humans' inertia of desire attracts people to come to her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even without her lying, humans' inertia of desire attracts people to come to her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Blind desire. Even knowing that destruction waits at the end, humans do not give up their desires.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Blind desire. Even knowing that destruction waits at the end, humans do not give up their desires.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Blind desire. Even knowing that destruction waits at the end, humans do not give up their desires.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is a truth that remains constant regardless of time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is a truth that remains constant regardless of time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is a truth that remains constant regardless of time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kuh... Ugh... P-please, have mercy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kuh... Ugh... P-please, have mercy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kuh... Ugh... P-please, have mercy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Talk. Where is she?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Talk. Where is she?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Talk. Where is she?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know. I really don't... It is true that she frequents our bar, but... she hasn't visited recently.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know. I really don't... It is true that she frequents our bar, but... she hasn't visited recently.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know. I really don't... It is true that she frequents our bar, but... she hasn't visited recently.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, yeah? Then it'll make my job easier to find her after I burn this bar down to the ground.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, yeah? Then it'll make my job easier to find her after I burn this bar down to the ground.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, yeah? Then it'll make my job easier to find her after I burn this bar down to the ground.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No! Please! Not my bar!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No! Please! Not my bar!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No! Please! Not my bar!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
That
8ks enough.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
That
8ks enough.

8ks enough.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: So it's you. You're the one who has been going around destroying my favorite bars.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So it's you. You're the one who has been going around destroying my favorite bars.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So it's you. You're the one who has been going around destroying my favorite bars.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Long time no see, missy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Long time no see, missy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Long time no see, missy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Or should I call you, Lamia?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Or should I call you, Lamia?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Or should I call you, Lamia?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you want? Why are you looking for me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you want? Why are you looking for me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you want? Why are you looking for me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I want you to use your magic to make me a member of the Council.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I want you to use your magic to make me a member of the Council.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I want you to use your magic to make me a member of the Council.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your eyes have changed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your eyes have changed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your eyes have changed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Have they? I've been through a lot since we last met.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Have they? I've been through a lot since we last met.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Have they? I've been through a lot since we last met.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I even got rid of that friend who tried to use me and threw me away.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I even got rid of that friend who tried to use me and threw me away.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I even got rid of that friend who tried to use me and threw me away.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Poor thing. So you became a monster to avoid becoming their prey.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Poor thing. So you became a monster to avoid becoming their prey.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Poor thing. So you became a monster to avoid becoming their prey.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aren't you the same? You've always dealt with helpless monsters like me, haven't you, Lamia?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aren't you the same? You've always dealt with helpless monsters like me, haven't you, Lamia?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aren't you the same? You've always dealt with helpless monsters like me, haven't you, Lamia?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You... still have a chance to make things right. At least for now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You... still have a chance to make things right. At least for now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You... still have a chance to make things right. At least for now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come clean from that life. Then, you won't be crushed by karma.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come clean from that life. Then, you won't be crushed by karma.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come clean from that life. Then, you won't be crushed by karma.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mwa hah hah!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mwa hah hah!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mwa hah hah!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You know what? The most useless thing I know is sympathy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You know what? The most useless thing I know is sympathy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You know what? The most useless thing I know is sympathy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It makes you weak through superficial justifications, and it changes nothing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It makes you weak through superficial justifications, and it changes nothing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It makes you weak through superficial justifications, and it changes nothing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that so?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that so?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that so?

records.m_Talk_DEU: Then you must also know that everything comes at a cost.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then you must also know that everything comes at a cost.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Keke, now we're talking. I'll give you whatever you want in return.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Keke, now we're talking. I'll give you whatever you want in return.

records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if what I want will destroy you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if what I want will destroy you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just because I took some bribes
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just because I took some bribes
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just because I took some bribes

records.m_Talk_ENG: and wanted to get some street cred,
records.m_Talk_DEU: and wanted to get some street cred,
records.m_Talk_FRA: and wanted to get some street cred,

records.m_Talk_ENG: do you know how many members tried to kill me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: do you know how many members tried to kill me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: do you know how many members tried to kill me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sick of playing mind games with the other mafias and executing traitors.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sick of playing mind games with the other mafias and executing traitors.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sick of playing mind games with the other mafias and executing traitors.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I can get out of this damn situation, I don't care what the risks are.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I can get out of this damn situation, I don't care what the risks are.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I can get out of this damn situation, I don't care what the risks are.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Very well. I see you won't regret... whatever price you'll have to pay for your choices.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Very well. I see you won't regret... whatever price you'll have to pay for your choices.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Very well. I see you won't regret... whatever price you'll have to pay for your choices.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I brought the strongest one from the cupboard.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I brought the strongest one from the cupboard.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You'll forget about all your bad and good memories once you're completely drunk.

records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You'll forget about all your bad and good memories once you're completely drunk.

All the causality you've changed will definitely make all of us
8g

8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...No, I guess sugarcoating it won't be of any use to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The contract's over. You're free now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The contract's over. You're free now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The contract's over. You're free now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All that's left for you is to rest in peace.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All that's left for you is to rest in peace.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All that's left for you is to rest in peace.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lamia was a famous prophet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lamia was a famous prophet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lamia was a famous prophet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Her presence had brought about great change in the underworld, proving that the rumors were true.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Her presence had brought about great change in the underworld, proving that the rumors were true.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Her presence had brought about great change in the underworld, proving that the rumors were true.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But even after she went into hiding, a lot is still shrouded in mystery.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But even after she went into hiding, a lot is still shrouded in mystery.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But even after she went into hiding, a lot is still shrouded in mystery.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No one knows how she was able to possess such power,
records.m_Talk_DEU: No one knows how she was able to possess such power,
records.m_Talk_FRA: No one knows how she was able to possess such power,

records.m_Talk_ENG: what the lords of the underworld paid her,
records.m_Talk_DEU: what the lords of the underworld paid her,
records.m_Talk_FRA: what the lords of the underworld paid her,

records.m_Talk_ENG: or even with what purpose she acted.
records.m_Talk_DEU: or even with what purpose she acted.
records.m_Talk_FRA: or even with what purpose she acted.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Only she knows the truth.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Only she knows the truth.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Only she knows the truth.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There is a woman named Lamia.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There is a woman named Lamia.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There is a woman named Lamia.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She is a famous fortune-teller in the Underground, known for altering people's fates.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She is a famous fortune-teller in the Underground, known for altering people's fates.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She is a famous fortune-teller in the Underground, known for altering people's fates.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But despite her popularity, no one knows where she lives or where to meet her.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But despite her popularity, no one knows where she lives or where to meet her.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But despite her popularity, no one knows where she lives or where to meet her.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There's a rumor that she often visits bars serving high-quality alcohol.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There's a rumor that she often visits bars serving high-quality alcohol.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There's a rumor that she often visits bars serving high-quality alcohol.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And that's why all the bars are doing their best to improve the quality of their drinks.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And that's why all the bars are doing their best to improve the quality of their drinks.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And that's why all the bars are doing their best to improve the quality of their drinks.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just hearing that she had appeared in some bar is enough to attract customers.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just hearing that she had appeared in some bar is enough to attract customers.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just hearing that she had appeared in some bar is enough to attract customers.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't you think we should report him to the police?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't you think we should report him to the police?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't you think we should report him to the police?

root.m_Talk_ENG: He's bleeding a lot... Do you think he's okay?
root.m_Talk_DEU: He's bleeding a lot... Do you think he's okay?
root.m_Talk_FRA: He's bleeding a lot... Do you think he's okay?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, dear. A bloodied man drinking all by himself? How romantic it is.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, dear. A bloodied man drinking all by himself? How romantic it is.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, dear. A bloodied man drinking all by himself? How romantic it is.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's none of your business, so piss off.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's none of your business, so piss off.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's none of your business, so piss off.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah, how cute. You're like a wounded wolf cub, growling at others.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah, how cute. You're like a wounded wolf cub, growling at others.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not here to chit chat, so leave me alone when I ask nicely.

root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not here to chit chat, so leave me alone when I ask nicely.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All right. Then I'll just silently drink beside you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All right. Then I'll just silently drink beside you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All right. Then I'll just silently drink beside you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmp!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmp!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmp!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh...?! What the hell was that for?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I disinfected your wound. Because I feel like I'll get drunk off the stench of blood rather than booze at this rate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I disinfected your wound. Because I feel like I'll get drunk off the stench of blood rather than booze at this rate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I disinfected your wound. Because I feel like I'll get drunk off the stench of blood rather than booze at this rate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: How is it? It's way more effective than drinking your pain away, isn't it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How is it? It's way more effective than drinking your pain away, isn't it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How is it? It's way more effective than drinking your pain away, isn't it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...A healing ability? I heard Counters with those kinds of abilities are hard to find.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...A healing ability? I heard Counters with those kinds of abilities are hard to find.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...A healing ability? I heard Counters with those kinds of abilities are hard to find.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you like it? And it's not just healing that I can do, you know.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you like it? And it's not just healing that I can do, you know.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you like it? And it's not just healing that I can do, you know.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Aren't you nosy? Are you a volunteer for something or what?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Aren't you nosy? Are you a volunteer for something or what?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Aren't you nosy? Are you a volunteer for something or what?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't say it was for free.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't say it was for free.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't say it was for free.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I got no money. If you're trying to rip someone off, you chose the wrong guy.

root.m_Talk_FRA: I got no money. If you're trying to rip someone off, you chose the wrong guy.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, really? I thought people who drink with blood on their hands are usually loaded.

root.m_Talk_DEU: How did you end up here with all those wounds?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How did you end up here with all those wounds?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I hurt a person. But I don't want to gossip about something like that.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't be ridiculous. It's too late to turn back now... but there was nothing I could do this time.

root.m_Talk_FRA: That's odd. Because in my eyes, it looks like you'll be drenched in a lot of blood in the future.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you were also a man, I would've already. If you're here to pick a fight, find someone else.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you were also a man, I would've already. If you're here to pick a fight, find someone else.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you were also a man, I would've already. If you're here to pick a fight, find someone else.

root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Did you have someone do a background check on me?

root.m_Talk_DEU: Were you hurt because of criminals?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Were you hurt because of criminals?

root.m_Talk_DEU: I accidentally slipped while I was helping out an idiot friend.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I accidentally slipped while I was helping out an idiot friend.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you accidentally hurt someone, you must not be a very good cop. How can an innocent citizen like me rest at ease knowing this, hmm?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you accidentally hurt someone, you must not be a very good cop. How can an innocent citizen like me rest at ease knowing this, hmm?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you accidentally hurt someone, you must not be a very good cop. How can an innocent citizen like me rest at ease knowing this, hmm?

root.m_Talk_FRA: Willfully becoming unemployed?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's none of your business.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's none of your business.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's none of your business.

root.m_Talk_FRA: My friend... He said he'd find me a spot in his mafia family. I'll have to start over there.

root.m_Talk_FRA: So you committed a crime because of your friend, and now you're going to go work for him?

root.m_Talk_FRA: He's reckless, and stupid enough that I want to beat him up. But he's good at business.

root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Good luck. I think you'll be able to succeed in anything with your possibilities.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit. I don't know why I'm even telling a woman I just met in a bar all this.

root.m_Talk_FRA: It's all right. People want to let out their true feelings when they're drunk.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And I'm the type who can't remember a thing after waking up the next day.

root.m_Talk_FRA: And I'm the type who can't remember a thing after waking up the next day.

root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you regret it?

root.m_Talk_DEU: If I had known this was going to happen, I would have started working with my friend from the beginning.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I had known this was going to happen, I would have started working with my friend from the beginning.

root.m_Talk_FRA: This friend of yours... I think it's best you don't rely on him too much.

root.m_Talk_FRA: The shock of being betrayed by something or someone you trusted hits harder than you might think.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Bye-bye.

root.m_Talk_FRA: An ambitious, but warm-hearted man... Those types usually get a knife to their backs.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe I should've given him my business card?

root.m_Talk_DEU: Lamia is a kind woman who doesn't know how to lie.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Lamia is a kind woman who doesn't know how to lie.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even without her lying, humans' inertia of desire attracts people to come to her.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even without her lying, humans' inertia of desire attracts people to come to her.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even without her lying, humans' inertia of desire attracts people to come to her.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Blind desire. Even knowing that destruction waits at the end, humans do not give up their desires.

root.m_Talk_FRA: This is a truth that remains constant regardless of time.

That
8ks enough.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh?

root.m_Talk_FRA: Long time no see, missy.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Or should I call you, Lamia?

root.m_Talk_FRA: Have they? I've been through a lot since we last met.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I even got rid of that friend who tried to use me and threw me away.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I even got rid of that friend who tried to use me and threw me away.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I even got rid of that friend who tried to use me and threw me away.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Poor thing. So you became a monster to avoid becoming their prey.

root.m_Talk_FRA: You... still have a chance to make things right. At least for now.

root.m_Talk_DEU: Come clean from that life. Then, you won't be crushed by karma.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Come clean from that life. Then, you won't be crushed by karma.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mwa hah hah!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mwa hah hah!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mwa hah hah!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...You know what? The most useless thing I know is sympathy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...You know what? The most useless thing I know is sympathy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...You know what? The most useless thing I know is sympathy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It makes you weak through superficial justifications, and it changes nothing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It makes you weak through superficial justifications, and it changes nothing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It makes you weak through superficial justifications, and it changes nothing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is that so?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is that so?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is that so?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then you must also know that everything comes at a cost.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then you must also know that everything comes at a cost.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then you must also know that everything comes at a cost.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Keke, now we're talking. I'll give you whatever you want in return.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Keke, now we're talking. I'll give you whatever you want in return.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Keke, now we're talking. I'll give you whatever you want in return.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if what I want will destroy you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if what I want will destroy you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if what I want will destroy you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just because I took some bribes
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just because I took some bribes
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just because I took some bribes

root.m_Talk_ENG: and wanted to get some street cred,
root.m_Talk_DEU: and wanted to get some street cred,
root.m_Talk_FRA: and wanted to get some street cred,

root.m_Talk_ENG: do you know how many members tried to kill me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: do you know how many members tried to kill me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: do you know how many members tried to kill me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sick of playing mind games with the other mafias and executing traitors.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sick of playing mind games with the other mafias and executing traitors.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sick of playing mind games with the other mafias and executing traitors.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I can get out of this damn situation, I don't care what the risks are.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I can get out of this damn situation, I don't care what the risks are.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I can get out of this damn situation, I don't care what the risks are.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Very well. I see you won't regret... whatever price you'll have to pay for your choices.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Very well. I see you won't regret... whatever price you'll have to pay for your choices.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Very well. I see you won't regret... whatever price you'll have to pay for your choices.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I brought the strongest one from the cupboard.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I brought the strongest one from the cupboard.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I brought the strongest one from the cupboard.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I can't seem to remember what you liked to drink.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I can't seem to remember what you liked to drink.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I can't seem to remember what you liked to drink.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...You'll forget about all your bad and good memories once you're completely drunk.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...You'll forget about all your bad and good memories once you're completely drunk.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...You'll forget about all your bad and good memories once you're completely drunk.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
All the causality you've changed will definitely make all of us
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
All the causality you've changed will definitely make all of us
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
All the causality you've changed will definitely make all of us
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...No, I guess sugarcoating it won't be of any use to you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...No, I guess sugarcoating it won't be of any use to you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...No, I guess sugarcoating it won't be of any use to you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The contract's over. You're free now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The contract's over. You're free now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The contract's over. You're free now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All that's left for you is to rest in peace.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All that's left for you is to rest in peace.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All that's left for you is to rest in peace.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Lamia was a famous prophet.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Lamia was a famous prophet.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Lamia was a famous prophet.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Her presence had brought about great change in the underworld, proving that the rumors were true.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Her presence had brought about great change in the underworld, proving that the rumors were true.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Her presence had brought about great change in the underworld, proving that the rumors were true.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But even after she went into hiding, a lot is still shrouded in mystery.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But even after she went into hiding, a lot is still shrouded in mystery.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But even after she went into hiding, a lot is still shrouded in mystery.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No one knows how she was able to possess such power,
root.m_Talk_DEU: No one knows how she was able to possess such power,
root.m_Talk_FRA: No one knows how she was able to possess such power,

root.m_Talk_ENG: what the lords of the underworld paid her,
root.m_Talk_DEU: what the lords of the underworld paid her,
root.m_Talk_FRA: what the lords of the underworld paid her,

root.m_Talk_ENG: or even with what purpose she acted.
root.m_Talk_DEU: or even with what purpose she acted.
root.m_Talk_FRA: or even with what purpose she acted.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Only she knows the truth.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Only she knows the truth.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Only she knows the truth.
